topic: Codex v0.3 adapter release-smoke certification: decide whether the retained projected custom-agent transport evidence is sufficient to certify the adapter, and identify any P0 blockers before release.
objective: Decide whether retained projected custom-agent transport evidence is sufficient to certify the Codex v0.3 adapter release smoke, and identify any P0 blockers before release.
certificationQuestion: Is the retained projected custom-agent transport evidence sufficient for v0.3 adapter release certification?
mustIdentify: whether real Codex projected custom-agent host ids are retained
whether runtime prompt-build artifacts are used as the only expert prompts
whether raw wait batches are persisted before interpretation
whether transport collection, WAL finalization, trace, evidence, validate-host-step, validate-loop, and validate-discussion pass
